prose:
**Benzene HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted (RIJK)) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point calculation on the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz` (no geometry optimization). SCF converged in 8 cycles; no warnings reported.

HOMO = −7.0468329 eV  
LUMO = −0.41574728 eV  
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = **6.6310857 eV**

Reproducibility:  
• Command:  
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpe3eha4d9/live.json`  
• JSON output: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpe3eha4d9/live.json`  
• A live `.out` log was being written to `frontier-<timestamp>.out` in your working directory while the calculation ran.
